projectDescription: Llea is a customer intelligence platform for Shopify brands that scores every visitor by purchase intent in real time and triggers personalised outreach through your existing email, SMS, and WhatsApp tools.
keyFeatures: Real-time purchase intent scoring (0–100) powered by 100+ behavioural, transactional, contextual, and demographic signals
1:1 Marketing Personalisation — right product, right channel, right time per individual shopper
Smart Stock Clearance — matches slow-moving inventory to the buyers most likely to purchase
Shopify-native install via web pixel — no theme edits, no code, no developer required
Shopify Flow integration as the central delivery hub routing to Klaviyo, WhatsApp, SMS, and more
AI Composer generating personalised outreach in brand voice with single-use named discount codes
Agency roster view for managing multiple client stores from a single dashboard
Per-store ML model trained on your own purchase history — never pooled across merchants
GDPR, CCPA, and DPDPA compliant with full data deletion on uninstall within 48 hours
publicApiSurface: Shopify Web Pixel (auto-registered — no manual install)
Shopify Flow custom event triggers (intent threshold crossings)
HTTP webhook hand-off for WhatsApp (Wati, AiSensy, Interakt, Gallabox), MoEngage, CleverTap, WebEngage
Meta & Google Ads weekly top-intent cohort export (lookalike seeds)
Headless/Hydrogen client SDK (~20 lines) for custom storefronts
CSV export for any segment or audience
Alerts via email, Slack, or webhook
